11ty

2026.03.10 Stille Jia-Rou

devlog

I think I actually migrated successfully to 11ty from pure web components??? It kind of messed with the styling cuz I had some within the component.js but it's okay, that's the fun part anyways. Also am thinking about devlog naming conventions, now I just set it as the current date. Today was a preductive day none the less and I even got git up and running. Since the styling is a bit wonky still, I won't push this to Neocities just yet. I'll fix the style.css tomorrow hopefully.

I also want to add title and date to base.njk
